data.content: Implementation review: approved. Reviewed branch codex/43ee-repo-browser-clipping at commit 2525f03c96abcb0483cfe066f6cfdd063cef9848 against main. The change is scoped to the directory browser layout and its hermetic class regression test. It addresses the acceptance criteria by preventing the breadcrumb flex row from collapsing, preserving path navigation and the scrollable directory list, and avoiding unrelated UI behavior changes. Verified gates recorded from implementation: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build, plus Playwright visual metrics showing breadcrumbHeight=21.25, upTop=250.14, listOverflowY=auto. No invariants listed; no security or maintainability concerns found.
